addGenerationDialog.description: Add the genereated components to your board. This will not overwrite the current wireflow on the board and you will be able to edit it.
addGenerationDialog.title: Add generated wireflow to board

deleteRequirementDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the requirement and all its data.
deleteRequirementDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete this requirement?

editRequirementDialog.description: Make changes to your requirement here. Click save when you're done.

validation.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 500 characters
validation.titleMax: Title must be at most 100 characters

editRequirementDialog.title: Edit requirement

endWizard.description: Thank you for completing all the steps!
endWizard.title: End of the Board

description.completed: You can click to view your new wireflow.
description.error: There was an error while creating the wireflow.

initWizard.description: You will follow the StartFlow method step-by-step. By the end, you’ll have a low-fidelity MVP ready to present, test, and refine.

features.description: List and prioritize the main functionalities you want in your MVP.
features.title: Understand & organize features

review.description: Check your flows for clarity, efficiency, and a great user experience.
review.title: Review & refine

wireflows.description: Create simple, low-fidelity screens showing how users will interact.
wireflows.title: Build your wireflows

initWizard.title: Let’s get started with your board!

requirementsList.description: List and prioritize the main features and user needs for your MVP. You can add, edit, and delete requirements by yourself or talking with your board with in the chat.

scoreDescription.average: Acceptable performance with room for improvement
scoreDescription.bad: Significantly below expectations across evaluated heuristics

completed.description: You can click to view the detailed board review.
completed.title: Review completed

error.description: There was an error while reviewing the board.
error.title: Failed to review board

startflowCriterion1.title: StartFlow Criterion 1: Trigger availability
startflowCriterion1.description: Does every screen contain at least one trigger that allows the user to continue or go back?

explanation.missingTriggers: We found screens without triggers, please check the suggestions with the screen names.
explanation.noIssues: Great job! All screens have appropriate triggers for navigation.

startflowCriterion2.title: StartFlow Criterion 2: Completion feedback
startflowCriterion2.description: Is there a screen that clearly communicates to the user that the task has been completed?

startflowCriterion3.title: StartFlow Criterion 3: Text-based triggers
startflowCriterion3.description: Do text-based triggers clearly describe the action that will be executed?

startflowCriterion4.title: StartFlow Criterion 4: Icon-based triggers
startflowCriterion4.description: Are icon-based triggers clear and unambiguous?

nielsenHeuristic2.title: Nielsen Heuristic 2: Match between system and the real world
nielsenHeuristic2.description: The interface should speak the user's language, using familiar terms, concepts, and structures. Information should appear in a natural and logical order.

nielsenHeuristic4.title: Nielsen Heuristic 4: Consistency and standards
nielsenHeuristic4.description: The user should not have doubts if different elements mean the same thing. Follow platform conventions and visual patterns.

nielsenHeuristic6.title: Nielsen Heuristic 6: Recognition rather than recall
nielsenHeuristic6.description: Reduce the user's memory load by making actions, objects, and instructions visible and easy to retrieve whenever necessary.

nielsenHeuristic8.title: Nielsen Heuristic 8: Aesthetic and minimalist design
nielsenHeuristic8.description: Only relevant information should be displayed. Unnecessary content competes with important information and reduces clarity.

shareBoardDialog.description: Anyone with this link will be able to view your board.

shared.description: Anyone with the link can view this board.
shared.title: This board is publicly shared!

unshared.description: Generate a public link to allow others to view your board.
unshared.title: This Board is not shared yet

shareBoardDialog.title: Share Board

toast.addGenerationError: Failed to add generation to board
